events.title: Full Moon Kirtan & Sacred Tea
events.description: Dragon Tea Temple's monthly full-moon ceremony returns on September 8 after a July–August hiatus. The format — BhakTea Kirtan journey, ecstatic dance by fire, and Cosmic Sound Healing — is a DTT signature: sacred tea is served throughout the evening, tuned to the kirtan energies being invoked. Past editions in 2026 ran January 3, March 14, April 15, and June 15; the series skipped the July and August full moons and re-opens with this September 8 per-edition slug. Dragon Tea Temple is an established Penestanan kirtan venue; facilitator for this edition not confirmed in indexed sources — check Megatix page before admin approval.
events.short_description: Dragon Tea Temple's full-moon ceremony returns Sep 8: BhakTea Kirtan, ecstatic dance by fire, and Cosmic Sound Healing.
events.venue_address: Jl. Penestanan No.8, Sayan, Ubud, Bali
events.price_info: IDR 300,000–400,000 (early bird / presale / door — confirm on Megatix)
